channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Avoid this AI stack mistake before it’s too late
item.description: Cut API latency from 2.1s to 180ms with a boring stack: Postgres + pgvector, Redis, BullMQ, and FastAPI. Real numbers, real code, and the mistakes that break AI-first apps.

item.title: Your AI tools don't improve velocity — here's the proof
item.description: Cut sprint waste by 30% with real AI velocity metrics — cycle time, escaped defects, and CI tests that catch regressions — not PR counts. Learn why story points lie and how to measure impact at any budget tier.

item.title: Skip RabbitMQ when your queue is 10k/sec
item.description: Cut API response time by 60% with Redis Streams — when queues are overkill, what’s the real cost, and which tools to use instead

item.title: Balance client work vs side projects: tools that help
item.description: Balance client work and side projects with ClickUp or Google Calendar. Reduce weekend stress, align deadlines, and improve focus. See which fits your workflow.

item.title: Pool size: most set it wrong
item.description: Cut database p99 latency by 70% by sizing connection pools the wrong way — concurrency limits, churn rates, and idle budgets you’re ignoring. Benchmarks, formulas, and mistakes from real systems.

item.title: Agents get stuck in production too
item.description: Cut agent routing errors by 98% with multi-agent systems — real latency, failure modes, and tool choices from a 1.2M order system. multi-agent systems in production performance numbers tools failure modes

item.title: Agentic AI for solo devs: where it saves hours
item.description: Cut build time by 60% with agentic AI — when it works for solo devs and when it backfires with concrete case studies and benchmarks from real freelance projects

item.title: Zero-trust for 5 people? Skip the hype
item.description: Cut cloud security overhead 60% with zero-trust that actually fits five-person teams — identity hygiene, least privilege IAM, and automated rotation with real latency and cost numbers

item.title: AI skills paying 40% more by 2026: data vs prompt
item.description: and got a 40% raise when hired full-time. T with AI Skills — build a transaction categorization model.

item.title: Choose PostgreSQL in 2026: 5 benchmarks
item.description: Run analytics workloads 4.4x faster with PostgreSQL 16.1 vs MySQL 8.0.36 — connection pooling, BRIN indexes, and the exact Docker stack used in 8 production migrations

item.title: Pick the right realtime API: WebSockets vs SSE vs long
item.description: Compare WebSocket, SSE and long polling with real numbers on memory, latency and cost — pick the right realtime transport for your product before you ship. Benchmarks from localhost and $5 DigitalOcean droplet included.

item.title: Doctors, lawyers, scientists: who’s running prod in
item.description: Cut deployment latency from 4 days to 5 minutes with domain-specific builders that emit compliant, production-ready code — p99 latency 8 ms, SOC2 artifacts auto-generated, no terminal required

item.title: Over-engineering cost us 3 weeks and $7k
item.description: Cut API latency from 420ms to 65ms and cloud costs 93% with a monolith — the over-engineering trap that cost $25k and 3 weeks, with code and benchmarks.

item.title: AI learns your codebase: don't trust autocomplete
item.description: Cut code-review feedback loops 40% with repository intelligence — tree-sitter ASTs, vector indexes, and the tools that actually understand your whole codebase.

item.title: Self-taught? Skip the CS whiteboard trap
item.description: Ship 3 projects, get hired: how self-taught devs ace remote interviews without Leetcode burnout — evidence from Lisbon, Dubai, and Nairobi deployments

item.title: Stop writing glue code: MCP servers do it for you
item.description: Cut internal tooling maintenance by 80% with MCP servers — real benchmarks, failure modes, and a step-by-step implementation guide for production systems

item.title: Ship code, not profiles: how Africans land remote jobs
item.description: Land remote jobs from Africa by shipping real systems, not polished profiles. Cut job hunt time from 72 days to 12 with proof-first portfolios — benchmarks, Terraform modules, and incident logs that teams actually read.

item.title: Rate limit 500 req/s without pissing off clients
item.description: Cut API P99 latency from 2300 ms to 145 ms without SaaS bloat — fixed-window Redis counters with retry-aware acceptance reduced retry storms 42% to 3% and saved $168/month on cloud costs.

item.title: Schedule at 3am or 3pm? Carbon-aware deployments under
item.description: ons by 40-50% without touching code. I firs with Schedule 3am 3pm Carbon-aware — touching code.

item.title: Edge functions pay off only at 50k req/day
item.description: Cut origin server costs 30% by moving revalidations to edge functions — real latency benchmarks, CPU limits, and the 50k daily request breakpoint where Workers and Vercel Edge actually pay off.
